Bash(python - <<'PY'
from PIL import Image
from pathlib import Path

def save_jpeg\(src, dst, quality=82, optimize=True, progressive=True\):
    with Image.open\(src\) as img:
        if img.mode in \('RGBA', 'P'\):
            img = img.convert\('RGB'\)
        img.save\(dst, format='JPEG', quality=quality, optimize=optimize, progressive=progressive\)

def save_png\(src, dst, max_size=600\):
    with Image.open\(src\) as img:
        img = img.convert\('RGBA'\)
        w, h = img.size
        if max\(w, h\) > max_size:
            scale = max_size / float\(max\(w, h\)\)
            img = img.resize\(\(int\(w*scale\), int\(h*scale\)\), Image.LANCZOS\)
        img.save\(dst, format='PNG', optimize=True\)

base = Path\('D:/Project/hongda/portal-ui/src/assets/images'\)
logo = base / 'hongdalogo.png'
ben = base / 'about/ben.jpg'
bg = base / 'product/bg.jpg'

save_png\(logo, logo, max_size=600\)
save_jpeg\(ben, ben, quality=80\)
save_jpeg\(bg, bg, quality=82\)
print\('compressed'\)
PY)

Bash(python - <<'PY'
from PIL import Image
from pathlib import Path
files = [
    Path\(r'D:/Project/hongda/portal-ui/src/assets/images/hongdalogo.png'\),
    Path\(r'D:/Project/hongda/portal-ui/src/assets/images/about/ben.jpg'\),
    Path\(r'D:/Project/hongda/portal-ui/src/assets/images/product/bg.jpg'\),
]
for f in files:
    size = f.stat\(\).st_size/1024
    with Image.open\(f\) as img:
        print\(f'{f.name}: {img.format} {img.size} {size:.1f} KB'\)
PY)

Bash(python - <<'PY'
from PIL import Image
from pathlib import Path

def compress_jpeg\(path, max_size=None, quality=78\):
    with Image.open\(path\) as img:
        if img.mode in \('RGBA', 'P'\):
            img = img.convert\('RGB'\)
        w, h = img.size
        if max_size and max\(w, h\) > max_size:
            scale = max_size / float\(max\(w, h\)\)
            img = img.resize\(\(int\(w*scale\), int\(h*scale\)\), Image.LANCZOS\)
        img.save\(path, format='JPEG', quality=quality, optimize=True, progressive=True\)

base = Path\('D:/Project/hongda/portal-ui/src/assets/images'\)
ben = base / 'about/ben.jpg'
bg = base / 'product/bg.jpg'
compress_jpeg\(ben, max_size=1400, quality=78\)
compress_jpeg\(bg, max_size=None, quality=78\)
print\('recompressed'\)
PY)
